content.hint: 用具体能力+效果结构，避免空泛形容词

balance technical precision with clear communication

content.situation: 在面试中，面试官希望你说明你如何为团队带来独特价值
content.speakerText: What unique strength do you bring to a team?
content.speakerTextCn: 你为团队带来什么独特的优势？
content.knowledgePoint: 优势表达：能力+影响结构
content.responseTemplate: I ______, which helps me collaborate effectively and drive results.
